zh.lifeSummary: 當Osbern d'Arques於1059年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Wolfric Mercia50歲，母親Beatrice d'Arques34歲。他和Rohese de Bollington至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1099年被列為high sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於大約1116年在英國英格蘭越可爾索普 阿其享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Osbern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + beorn ‘bear, warrior’ (both of Scandinavian origin). As a modern given name it generally represents a transferred use of the surname that was derived from this name during the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Osbourne
meanings: From a Late Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + beorn ‘bear, warrior’ (both of Scandinavian origin). As a modern given name it generally represents a transferred use of the surname that was derived from this name during the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Osborne
meanings: From a Late Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + beorn ‘bear, warrior’ (both of Scandinavian origin). As a modern given name it generally represents a transferred use of the surname that was derived from this name during the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Osbern d'Arques was born in 1059, in Normandy, France, his father, Wolfric Mercia, was 50 and his mother, Beatrice d'Arques, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Rohese de Bollington. In 1099, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of yorkshire. He died about 1116, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osbern d'Arques est né en 1059, à Normandie, France, son père, Wolfric Mercia, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Beatrice d'Arques, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Rohese de Bollington. En 1099, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé environ 1116, à Thorp Arch, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, United K: Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Osbern d'Arques 1059 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wolfric Mercia 50 und seine Mutter Beatrice d'Arques 34. Er hatte mit Rohese de Bollington mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1099, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb um 1116 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osbern d'Arques è nato il nel 1059 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Wolfric Mercia, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice d'Arques, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Rohese de Bollington. Nel 1099, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of yorkshire. Morì circa 1116, nel Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbern d'Arquesが1059年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Wolfric Merciaは50歳，母Beatrice d'Arquesは34歳であった。彼はRohese de Bollingtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1099年，42歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は約1116年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルプ アーチで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbern d'Arques(이)가 1059년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wolfric Mercia(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice d'Arques(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Rohese de Bollington(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1099년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 대략 1116년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소 아치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Rohese de Bollington. Em 1099, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1116, em Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osbern d'Arques родился в 1059 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Wolfric Mercia было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice d'Arques, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Rohese de Bollington. В 1099 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер около 1116 г. в местности таурп арч, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
